title: If you have to include weekends on a WORK calendar, at least shade them differently
excerpt: Since people have been asking for the ability to not display weekends on calendards for over three years, and the devs haven’t made that happen, at least maybe allow us to shade backgrounds of the weekend tiles on calend…

posts.author: tjb (Troy Brophy)
posts.cookedHtml: Since people have been asking for the ability to not display weekends on calendards for over three years, and the devs haven’t made that happen, at least maybe allow us to shade backgrounds of the weekend tiles on calendars so it’s more visually clear which days are working days.
